case.title: IN RE ST PAUL FIRE & MARINE INS CO

opinion.h1: IN RE ST PAUL FIRE & MARINE INS CO, 134 U.S. 493 (1890)
opinion.h2: In re ST. PAUL F. & M. INS. CO.
opinion.p: No opinion. This case is similar in all respects to the case of In re Louisville Underwriters, ante, 587, and a like decision was rendered herein at the same term.
